subcodes.first_line: O thou whose breast is dilated by the verses of guidance, whose heart is drawn by the fragrances wafting from the gardens of the Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المنشرح الصدر بایات الهدی المنجذب القلب بنفحات مرت من ریاض الملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement
